text: Tune in this Saturday noon-2PM on WDVI 1380 AM for Desi Vibes! Navratri special with Geeta Iyer from Edison Cultural Committee. #DesiVibes #EdisonNJ
Great turnout at yesterday's show! Thanks to everyone who called in about their favorite fall traditions. Next week: DIWALI SPECIAL!
Edison Township meeting tonight covered some important road improvement plans for Route 27. Good to see the community engaged.
Customer Appreciation BBQ coming up! Free food, car care demos, and good vibes. Details on our Eventbrite page.
Nothing beats the sound of a freshly rebuilt L24 inline six. 240Z project update coming to YouTube soon.
